news.headline: ScrUSDTH25 on BitMEX now uses Fair Price, calculated from Binance, Kucoin, and Bitget spot prices for accuracy.
news.summary: BitMEX has transitioned the Mark Method for SCRUSDTH25 to Fair Price marking, incorporating a fresh index reliant on spot prices obtained from Binance, Kucoin, and Bitget. This new approach aims to enhance accuracy and transparency in the trading process.

news.headline: McCarthy emphasizes Trump’s need to secure Pennsylvania for victory.
Hyatt Centric Santo Domingo opens in Dominican Republic, first in Caribbean, in stylish Ensanche Piantini neighborhood.
news.summary: Hyatt Hotels Corporation (NYSE: H) has unveiled the inaugural Hyatt Centric hotel in the Caribbean with the launch of Hyatt Centric Santo Domingo in Chicago. Situated in the chic Ensanche Piantini neighborhood, this trendy property caters to both business and leisure tourists, offering the chance to discover the blend of historical and modern attractions in Santo Domingo, the capital of the Dominican Republic. Guests can partake in upscale shopping, dining, and entertainment experiences, with the convenience of being close to the UNESCO World Heritage Site.

news.headline: October is Breast Cancer Awareness Month. Advocates discuss reducing disparities in the Black community. (Characters: 85)
news.summary: Volunteers Danyelle Musselman and Flecia R. Brown from the American Cancer Society and American Cancer Society Cancer Action Network recently addressed the importance of engaging in research and advocacy to diminish cancer disparities for upcoming generations. Their discussion took place in Atlanta on October 24, 2024. This initiative aims to tackle the unequal distribution of cancer prevalence and outcomes. Through active involvement, they seek to improve the health prospects of individuals affected by cancer. These efforts are critical as they strive to create a more equitable future in the fight against cancer.

news.summary: A leading entertainment and dining destination, Dave & Buster's, is gearing up to launch its inaugural Clarksville venue on Monday, November 25. The establishment aims to recruit over 180 enthusiastic individuals to join their team.

The market stood at US$48.99 billion in 2023 and is projected to grow to US$78.17 billion by 2029. In volume, the market is expected to reach 16.57 billion liters by 2029.

Kadant (NYSE: KAI) to release Q3 results on Oct 29, hold webcast on Oct 30, 2024 at 11:00 a.m. ET for discussion.

A webcast will follow the next day, October 30, 2024, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time, where the NYSE-listed company (KAI) will elaborate on its financial performance for the third quarter and provide insights into future expectations.

news.headline: Key speakers including Tom Brady and Gita Gopinath to join Fortune Global Forum in NYC on Nov 11-12, alongside top business and policy leaders.
news.summary: Renowned figures such as seven-time world champion and successful entrepreneur Tom Brady and Deputy Managing Director of the IMF Gita Gopinath are set to speak at Fortune's yearly event for elite business executives and policymakers. Notable speakers also include former White House Cabinet members Leon Panetta and Mike Pompeo. This gathering will bring together prominent individuals from various fields to exchange ideas and insights.

news.headline: Mölnlycke Health Care partners with Transdiagen for wound care innovation in a research collaboration. (Characters: 90)
news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on October 24, 2024, Mölnlycke Health Care, a MedTech company globally recognized for its expertise in wound care and management, revealed a new research partnership with Transdiagen (TDG). Transdiagen is a precision medicine company dedicated to creating drugs and diagnostics for various purposes. This collaboration marks an important step forward in the field, combining Mölnlycke's extensive experience in wound care with TDG's innovative approach to precision medicine. The partnership is expected to yield significant advancements in healthcare research and development, offering potential benefits to a wide range of patients.

news.headline: Private equity firm Sverica Capital Management invests in Electronic Source Company, an aerospace defense electronics manufacturer.
news.summary: Boston-based private equity firm Sverica Capital Management LP revealed their strategic investment in Electronic Source Company (ESC) on October 18. ESC, an electronic manufacturing services company located in Van Nuys, California, specializes in producing high-reliability circuit card assemblies for the Aerospace & Defense and Space industries. The company is ITAR-registered and holds NadCap and AS9100D accreditations. ESC provides defense electronics globally, maintaining a strong position within these key markets.

news.headline: Klarna shareholders remove director amid board tension.
CIBC Innovation Banking extends credit facilities to LumiQ, a Toronto education platform, partnering with over 1,000 corporate firms.
news.summary: In Toronto, CIBC Innovation Banking revealed it has extended credit facilities to assist Vertu in their strategic investment in Toronto's LumiQ. LumiQ, founded in 2016, is a premier technology-driven education platform delivering accredited professional development courses and content to accounting and finance professionals. With a customer base of over 1,000 corporate and accounting firms in North America, LumiQ is well-established in the industry. The collaboration between CIBC Innovation Banking, Vertu, and LumiQ highlights a focus on supporting growth in the education sector and meeting financing requirements effectively.

Fed's Hammack cautions that inflation goal not yet achieved.
Ryder System Q3 results: Sales grew 8% to $3.17B, but missed estimates. Earnings fell to $188M, EPS beat at $3.44. Operating cash flow $1.7B, free cash flow $218M.
news.summary: Ryder System Inc (NYSE:R) saw a drop in stock value after releasing their third-quarter earnings report. Sales increased by 8% year-on-year, reaching $3.17 billion, falling short of the predicted $3.29 billion. Fleet Management Solutions revenue decreased by 1% to $1.47 billion, while Supply Chain Solutions revenue rose by 10% to $1.317 billion, and Dedicated Transportation Solutions spiked by 41% to $633 million. Earnings before tax also saw a decline from $213 million to $188 million compared to the same quarter last year. Despite this, the adjusted EPS of $3.44 surpassed expectations of $3.42. Operating cash flow for the nine months equaled $1.7 billion, including a free cash flow of $218 million. Ryder System currently holds $162 million in cash and equivalents.

news.headline: Asset Entities Inc. has until Feb 17, 2025, to comply with Nasdaq Rule 5550(b)(1) regarding listing requirements.
news.summary: A company named Asset Entities Inc. (NASDAQ: ASST), known for its digital marketing and content delivery services on Discord and other social media platforms, as well as a Ternary Payment Platform company, revealed that an extension has been granted to them until February 17, 2025. This extension allows them more time to meet the requirements of Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(b)(1). This news came out on October 22, 2024, from Dallas.

news.headline: Kargo, a GitOps project, hits v1.0 on Akuity platform, created by Argo founders.
news.summary: A project called Kargo, developed by the creators of Argo and focused on GitOps continuous promotion, has officially launched its version 1.0 on the Akuity platform. This platform originates from SUNNYVALE, Calif. and is distributed via BUSINESS WIRE.

news.headline: US stocks cautious ahead of Lockheed Martin, GM, and others' earnings. Nearly 20% of S&P 500 to report. Markets post gains for 6th straight week. Nasdaq up, Dow and S&P down. Key futures performance: Nasdaq -0.65%, S&P 500 0.00%, Dow Jones -0.48%, R2K -0.90% in premarket. SPY fell 0.50% to $580.71 and QQQ down 0.65% to $492.19. S&P 500 and Dow negative, while Nasdaq positive. AI stocks surged.
news.summary: Wall Street remained cautious amidst a week filled with earnings reports, but the market saw gains for the sixth consecutive week. Notably, nearly 20% of S&P 500 companies are expected to report earnings, with cumulative earnings projected to increase for a fifth straight quarter. Companies like GE Aerospace, Lockheed Martin Corp, 3M Company, Verizon Communications Inc, and General Motors will be watched closely. Futures markets showed mixed performance with Nasdaq 100 down 0.65% while the S&P 500 remained neutral. In premarket trading, SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust fell 0.50%, reaching $580.71, and the Invesco QQQ ETF declined 0.65% to $492.19. On the previous day, S&P 500 and Dow Jones closed in the red, while the Nasdaq Composite saw gains. AI stocks notably surged. Full story available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Baffin unveils Hero Collection for first responders, new protective footwear line. Available now.
news.summary: Canadian footwear company Baffin is thrilled to introduce the Hero Collection in Stoney Creek, Ontario. Launched on October 24, 2024, this new line offers protective footwear tailored for technical and emergency service professionals. The collection is designed to cater to their specific needs, including durability and functionality.

news.headline: Rebellion Energy Solutions expands U.S.-based methane-abatement credits with new ACR issuance and additional project listings, focusing on plugging orphan oil and gas wells leaking methane. #ClimateAction
news.summary: Initiatives are being implemented to utilize private sector funding for plugging orphan oil and gas wells that emit methane. These projects aim to address the underfunded public responsibility of addressing orphan wells by directing net-zero-focused capital from private sources. By channeling private capital into these efforts, the projects target orphan wells that release significant quantities of methane, thus reducing environmental harm.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs predicts US dollar will remain strong amid potential election outcomes, with Republican sweep implying tariff changes that could boost dollar value by 8-10%.
news.summary: As the 2024 U.S. presidential election nears, financial markets are preparing for its potential impact on the U.S. dollar. Past elections have led to a decrease in the dollar's value. Michael Cahill from Goldman Sachs believes that this time, the risks indicate a likelihood of continued dollar strength regardless of whether Vice President Kamala Harris or Ex-President Donald Trump wins the election. In the event of a Republican sweep, there could be significant tariff changes that might affect the dollar. Goldman Sachs' China economics team predicts that a 60% tariff on all U.S. imports from China could generate around $250 billion in revenue. Additionally, a 10% across-the-board tariff, coupled with higher tariffs on Chinese imports, could result in an 8-10% depreciation of the euro against the dollar. Cahill suggests that increased tariffs, particularly on Chinese products, may tilt the terms of trade in favor of the dollar, causing it to appreciate. This could lead to higher import costs, reduced foreign goods demand, and potential benefits for domestic producers who could increase prices.Overall, the U.S. dollar seems poised for strength in various election outcomes, with potential shifts in trade dynamics and tariff impositions influencing market movements.

news.headline: Binance teams up with Paymonade to enable crypto sales to credit/debit cards, enhancing convenience for users worldwide.
news.summary: Binance introduces a new functionality that enables users to directly sell cryptocurrencies to credit or debit cards through Paymonade. This feature aims to improve convenience and accessibility for the platform's worldwide user community.

news.headline: Dow Jones drops as Treasury yields rise; Nvidia stock at risk of sliding from record highs.
news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced a decline as the Dow Jones fell due to the ongoing increase in Treasury yields. Additionally, Nvidia's stock is at risk of dropping from its all-time high. These developments are indicative of a challenging environment for investors, with the Dow Jones facing pressure amidst the rising yields. It is crucial for investors to closely monitor these trends in the market, as they have significant implications for investment strategies and overall portfolio performance.

news.headline: I.M.F. declares victory in inflation battle, cautions about emerging risks.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that over 1,000 individuals in the city were affected by a cyber attack on a popular social media platform. Hackers were able to access personal information, including email addresses and phone numbers, of more than 800 users. Additionally, financial data of about 200 individuals was compromised. The authorities have launched an investigation into the incident and are urging all users to update their security settings and passwords to prevent further breaches.

news.headline: Crypto industry gains traction in Washington as midterm elections approach in two weeks.
news.summary: In two weeks, Washington is focused on the future leadership on Capitol Hill. A clear contender is the cryptocurrency sector, poised to exert influence in the coming year.

news.headline: Global market for Extra Virgin Olive Oil expected to hit USD 19.8 billion by 2031 due to rising consumer demand for healthier food options.
news.summary: The increasing recognition of the health advantages of Extra Virgin Olive Oil (EVOO) is a key factor propelling the market. EVOO is packed with monounsaturated fats, antioxidants, and anti-inflammatory agents, positioning it as a vital element in heart-healthy eating patterns like the Mediterranean diet. This has led to a surge in demand for EVOO in the market, with global consumption on the rise. The market for EVOO is predicted to experience continued growth as more consumers prioritize health and wellness in their dietary choices.

Andrew Borene & Wade Hansen from Flashpoint to speak at 14th Annual Cyber Security Summit in Minneapolis on October 28. Flashpoint has over 750 customers.

news.summary: On October 24, 2024, in Minneapolis, the Minnesota Dental Association cautioned treat-givers to opt for tooth-friendly options this Halloween and avoid popular sour candies. Despite appearing harmless, these treats can potentially harm teeth in the future. Sweet-and-sour treats...

news.headline: MADD warns of increased impaired driving on Halloween, a deadly night for children; urges safety as top priority.
news.summary: Halloween emerges as one of the most perilous nights for children and pedestrians, with a notable number of incidents reported. MADD has issued a safety reminder to families and drivers ahead of this spooky holiday. Based in Irving, Texas, the organization emphasizes the need for vigilance due to the increased instances of impaired driving on this occasion. The reminder aims to reduce the potential dangers, highlighting the importance of prioritizing safety for all individuals. With numerous accidents occurring on Halloween, it is crucial for both pedestrians and drivers to exercise caution and follow safety guidelines to prevent mishaps.

news.headline: Global healthcare analytics market projected to reach USD 18.05 billion by 2031 at 2.50% CAGR as per Verified Market Research® report.
news.summary: A prominent business intelligence and market analysis firm, Verified Market Research®, is excited to introduce its latest report on the "Healthcare Analytics Market Size and Forecast." This comprehensive and authoritative report provides insights into the growing trend of healthcare systems globally embracing analytics. This report offers a detailed analysis of market trends, growth opportunities, and forecasts for the healthcare analytics market. According to the report, the global healthcare analytics market is projected to reach a value of $XX billion by XX, showcasing a steady growth trajectory. This signifies a significant increase from the current market value of $XX billion. The report highlights the key factors driving this growth, including the increasing emphasis on data-driven decision-making in the healthcare industry. With the rising adoption of advanced technologies and the growing focus on improving patient outcomes and operational efficiency, the demand for healthcare analytics solutions is expected to surge in the coming years. This report serves as a valuable resource for industry players, investors, and stakeholders looking to navigate the evolving landscape of the healthcare analytics market.

news.headline: Charlton Aria Acquisition Corp. priced its $75 million Initial Public Offering of 7.5 million units at $10 each.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, Charlton Aria Acquisition Corporation (Nasdaq: CHARU) disclosed the pricing for its initial public offering of 7,500,000 units at $10.00 each. The units will be traded on the Nasdaq Global Market under the ticker symbol “CHARU” starting from the same day. Each unit includes one Class A ordinary share and one right to obtain one-eighth of a Class A ordinary share. Following the commencement of separate trading, the Class A ordinary shares and rights will be listed on Nasdaq as “CHAR” and “CHARR”, respectively. The underwriter holds a 45-day option to acquire up to an extra 1,125,000 units from the Company to cater for over-allotments, if any. The offering is anticipated to conclude on October 25, 2024, pending customary closing conditions.

news.headline: Mattress Firm's American Sleep Index reveals insights: 50% parents restrict kids on Halloween, 71% unconcerned about 2024 election's impact on sleep.
news.summary: Around 50% of parents are hesitant to allow their children to stay up later than usual on Halloween. Over 65% of adults experience an impact on their energy, mood, and focus due to Daylight Savings Time. Additionally, a significant portion, 71%, of Americans are not expected to lose sleep over the 2024 Presidential Election. This data was reported in Houston on October 24, 2024.

news.headline: Bay Area faces $110B cost with sea-level rise; inequitable climate impacts in at-risk neighborhoods without action.
news.summary: In San Francisco, it has been reported that Bay Area communities near the shore will face significant damage due to sea-level rise in the upcoming years. A new study by Next 10 and University of California Berkeley faculty indicates that around $110 billion will be required to combat sea-level rise by 2050. The report highlights the urgent need to revamp property institutions and land governance to fairly tackle the climate vulnerability of the region. It emphasizes that no coastal community will be immune to the consequences of this issue.

news.headline: US Coast Guard hosts free STEM festival "What Floats Your Boat?" for K-12 kids in Cleveland on Oct 24, 2024. Presented by STEM Global Action.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, in Cleveland, an organization called STEM Global Action (SGA) launched STEM SATURDAY events. These events provide a distinctive opportunity for students and parents to delve into STEM subjects together in a community setting. Participants take part in immersive, hands-on activities designed to spark curiosity and promote inquiry-based learning.

news.headline: Ataccama launches AI Agent for data management to enhance data quality, reduce costs. Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: Ataccama unveiled the Ataccama ONE AI Agent, an advanced and independent system that enhances data quality assurance while cutting operational expenses and simplifying processes, ensuring reliable data flow throughout the organization. This milestone was revealed in Boston on October 24, 2024.

news.headline: Union workers at Boeing reject new contract, extending strike at plane factories after $6.1 billion loss reported.
news.summary: Following Boeing's announcement of a $6.1 billion loss, a crucial vote took place to prolong a nearly six-week strike at facilities manufacturing its top-selling commercial aircraft.

news.headline: Han River in NYC offers free SHIN RAMYUN noodles. KCCNY brings Seoul taste to Midtown. "It's time for K-Culture" initiative.
news.summary: New Yorkers are being offered a unique opportunity to experience the vibrant culture of Seoul through the "It's time for K-Culture" initiative, a collaboration between the Korean Cultural Center New York (KCCNY) and Nongshim. The initiative, launched on October 24, 2024, aims to showcase the rich heritage of South Korea to the residents of New York City. The KCCNY, which operates under the Ministry of Culture, Sports, and Tourism (MCST), is spearheading this effort to promote cultural exchange and understanding. This initiative will be entirely free for attendees, making it accessible to a wide audience.

news.summary: Steve Kuhn, the CEO of MG Moving, participated in a panel of industry specialists during the 3-day Moving Titan Retreat, which attracted hundreds of attendees from emerging moving organizations nationwide. CellTrust's SL2 Enterprise Capture wins "Mobile Compliance Platform of the Year" award for 2024 by Mobile Breakthrough Awards.
news.summary: Scottsdale, Arizona - CellTrust has been recognized for its SL2™ Enterprise Capture and secure mobile communication platform, winning the "Mobile Compliance Platform of the Year" award in the 8th annual Mobile Breakthrough Awards. This prestigious award is given out by Mobile Breakthrough, a renowned market intelligence organization, honoring leading companies and products in the wireless and mobile industry. CellTrust's achievement highlights its commitment to innovation and compliance in the mobile sector. The award underscores the company's success in providing a secure and compliant platform for mobile communications in 2024.

news.headline: Pinwheel launches Bill Navigator, saves customers money by tracking subscriptions within digital banking. Powered by detection algorithm.
news.summary: The Bill Navigator service is designed to assist financial institutions such as banks, credit unions, and fintech companies in assisting their customers to save money. It simplifies the process of monitoring, overseeing, and terminating subscriptions through the digital banking platforms. By utilizing a top-tier algorithm for detecting transactions, Bill Navigator stands out as a unique offering in this space, helping users effectively manage their finances and potentially reduce unnecessary expenses.
